data.text/markdown:
Activity Detection Model — Training Notebook

10-class human activity recognition using the Capture24 dataset (100 Hz triaxial accelerometer, wrist-worn Axivity AX3, ±8g). Workflow: Configure → Load Data → Explore → Train → Evaluate → Export

data.text/markdown: 4. Normalize & Split
Per-axis z-score normalization (fit on train split only).

data.text/markdown: 5. Train Model
Dense-only model compatible with Axon NPU (FullyConnected + ReLU).
